chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8386 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 10-04-2025 Mr. Muhammad Waseemuddin, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Azad Hussain, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent department. As sought, petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
